pages.text_excerpt: About - Justin Madders Skip to main content Justin Madders Labour MP for Ellesmere Port & Bromborough Join Get Involved Donate About Contact News In Parliament Need my help? Privacy Policy More Menu About Following boundary changes at the 2024 General Election, I am now the MP for Ellesmere Port and Bromborough. I live in Little Sutton with my family and was for many years before my election a local councillor in Ellesmere Port. Before entering Parliament, I had a career in employment law, defending the rights of working people to be treated fairly and with dignity at work, I was first elected Labour MP for Ellesmere Port and Neston in May 2015. Working hard for Ellesmere Port & Bromborough Justin Madders Contact details 31 Whitby Road, Ellesmere Port, UK View on Google Maps Email: justin.madders.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Sue Pugh on behalf of Justin Madders, both at 31 Whitby Road, Ellesmere Port, CH65 0AA ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.text_excerpt: Contact - Justin Madders Skip to main content Justin Madders Labour MP for Ellesmere Port & Bromborough Join Get Involved Donate About Contact News In Parliament Need my help? Privacy Policy More Menu Contact Justin Madders Labour MP for Ellesmere Port & Bromborough Address 31 Whitby Road, Ellesmere Port, UK View on Google Maps Telephone 0151 355 2365 Email justin.madders.mp@parliament.uk Images of landmarks in New Ferry, Bromborough and Eastham. Satellite Advice Surgeries Residents of the Ellesmere Port & Bromborough constituency can speak with a member of the MP’s team at regular drop-in advice sessions. No appointment is required. New Ferry Community Land Trust , 78 New Chester Road, New Ferry, Wirral, CH62 5AD 1st and 3rd Monday of each month, 10am–4pm St Barnabas Village Centre , Church Square, Bromborough 2nd and 4th Friday of each month, 10am–4pm Eastham Library 1st and 3rd Friday of each month, 10am–4pm Residents are welcome to drop in during these times for support or advice from the MP’s team. Justin Madders Contact details 31 Whitby Road, Ellesmere Port, UK View on Google Maps Email: justin.madders.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Sue Pugh on behalf of Justin Madders, both at 31 Whitby Road, Ellesmere Port, CH65 0AA ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. Read more → Refineries: UK Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism 28 Apr 2026 Treasury Justin Madders received a response to a question they put to the government To ask the Chancellor of the Exchequer, what assessment she has made of the potential economic impact of delaying the inclusion of the refineries sector in a CBAM on the sector. pages.text_excerpt: Need my help? - Justin Madders Skip to main content Justin Madders Labour MP for Ellesmere Port & Bromborough Join Get Involved Donate About Contact News In Parliament Need my help? Privacy Policy More Menu Need my help? Let's get some details Use the form below to provide details for any issues you want me to look into on your behalf. Remember, I can only work on behalf of constituents in Ellesmere Port & Neston, you can click here to confirm whether I am your MP. Name * First Last Address * Address Line 1 Address Line 2 Town/City Postcode Email Would you like to sign up to receive my monthly email newsletter? Yes No Phone number Am I your MP? Yes If you are writing for support with a specific issue that you need my help with, Parliamentary protocol dictates that matters should be dealt with by a constituent's own Member of Parliament. You can click here to confirm whether I am your MP. Please describe the issue you need support with: IMPORTANT: If you would like me to contact Jobcentre Plus, the Department for Work and Pensions or HM Revenue and Customs for you then I will also need your National Insurance number and your date of birth. Who have you contacted regarding this issue and what was the result? I give my consent for the personal information I submit on this form to be used in accordance with the privacy policies identified below: * Yes I respect your right to privacy. The personal information that I hold about you is governed by legal regulations. My Privacy Policy sets out what information I hold, for what reason, how it is stored and how you can query this with me. I will retain the information submitted on this form for the reasons you have contacted me. You can read my Privacy Policy here . By completing this form, you give me permission to contact you and use the information that you have provided. This is a Labour Party Wordpress Network website. The Labour Party Wordpress Network has it's own privacy policy which you can read here Justin Madders Contact details 31 Whitby Road, Ellesmere Port, UK View on Google Maps Email: justin.madders.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Sue Pugh on behalf of Justin Madders, both at 31 Whitby Road, Ellesmere Port, CH65 0AA ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
